title: Just Outdoor Stuffs
description: Just a simple outdoor furniture and decor mod
body:
![Imgur](https://i.imgur.com/jyJtmy1.png)

Ever felt like spicing up your minecraft world with simple little things? Worry not! ***Just Outdoor Stuffs*** adds simple outdoor furniture and decors to fit all your outdoor decoration needs!

<details>
<summary>🛋️Available Sets</summary>

**1. Garden Set**
![Imgur](https://i.imgur.com/TaqbAMe.png)

**2. Patio Set**
![Imgur](https://i.imgur.com/T2cJlH8.png)
</details>


<details>
<summary>📝Notes</summary>

1. Versions ***1.20.1+*** is made from scratch (*special thanks to **ringpro**!*) so it has better functions and supports 2 players seating for benches!

2. ***Planters*** in version 1.19.2 was made with MCreator, so there are limitations to what it can do.

3. This mod will only be updated and maintained for versions ***1.19.2*** and above.

4. Feel free to use this mod in your modpack, as long as you link this page in the credits.

5. This mod will ***ONLY*** be available on Curseforge and Modrinth for ***SAFETY*** measures, and you're not allowed to upload it to other websites.

</details>

<details>
<summary>💿Update Log</summary>

- ✅ Version 1.0: Garden Set & Patio Set
- 🔄 Version 1.1: Mushroom Garden Set & Fairy Garden Set

</details>

<details>
<summary>📗Credits</summary>

Special thanks to ***ringpro*** for porting the mod to ***1.20.1+***!

</details>
